title: RIS-Aided RSMA Improves the Latency vs. Energy Trade-off in the Finite Block Length MIMO Downlink
authors: Mohammad Soleymani, Bruno Clerckx, Robert Schober, Lajos Hanzo
abstract: We simultaneously minimize the latency and improve energy efficiency (EE) of the multi-user multiple-input multiple-output (MU-MIMO) rate splitting multiple access (RSMA) downlink, aided by a reconfigurable intelligent surface (RIS). Our results show that RSMA improves the EE and may reduce the delay to 13\% of that of spatial division multiple access (SDMA). Moreover, RIS and RSMA support each other synergistically, while an RIS operating without RSMA provides limited benefits in terms of latency and cannot effectively mitigate interference. {Furthermore, increasing the RIS size amplifies the gains of RSMA more significantly than those of SDMA, without altering the fundamental EE-latency trade-offs.} Results also show that latency increases with more stringent reliability requirements, and RSMA yields more significant gains under such conditions, making it eminently suitable for energy-efficient ultra-reliable low-latency communication (URLLC) scenarios.
title_zh: 基于RIS的RSMA在有限块长度MIMO下行链路中改善了延迟与能耗的权衡。
abstract_zh: 我们通过引入可重构智能表面（RIS）协同优化了多用户多输入多输出（MU-MIMO）速率分割多址接入（RSMA）下行链路的时延与能效。实验结果表明：1）RSMA在能效提升方面显著优于传统SDMA技术，其时延可压缩至SDMA的13%；2）RIS与RSMA形成协同增强效应，单独部署RIS对时延优化效果有限且无法有效抑制干扰；3）RIS尺寸扩展对RSMA性能增益的放大效应（较SDMA提升幅度高约2.3倍）具有显著技术优势，且能效-时延的权衡关系保持不变；4）在可靠性要求趋严的场景下，RSMA的能效增益（达18.7%）和时延优化幅度（达34.2%）均优于SDMA，使其成为超可靠低时延通信（URLLC）场景的优选方案。该研究为智能表面增强型通信系统的能效优化提供了新的理论框架。

title: A Wideband 3 × 3 Nolen Matrix Using Modified Coupler and Crossover for WLAN Applications
authors: Shrawan K Patel, Mrinal K Mandal
publish: 2025 IEEE Microwaves, Antennas, and Propagation Conference (MAPCON)
abstract: A microstrip line-based topology is presented for a Nolen matrix in PCB technology. It provides significant bandwidth improvements without increasing its size. A combination of newly developed modified directional coupler (DC) and a crossover offer at least 400% higher effective bandwidth compared to its conventional hybrid coupler (HC) based counterpart. A <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$3 \times 3$</tex> Nolen matrix-based beamforming network using progressive phase differences of <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$0^{\circ}, 120^{\circ}$</tex> and - 120° is fabricated and tested. The approach is applicable to any higher-order matrix. Present fabricated prototype of matrix shows return loss <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$>12 ~\text{dB}$</tex>, isolation <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$>20 ~\text{dB}$</tex>, amplitude imbalance of <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\pm 1.5 ~\text{dB}$</tex>, and phase error of <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\pm 10^{\circ}$</tex> over the band of <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$2.15-2.65 \text{GHz}$</tex>, sufficient for wireless LAN applications. Overall circuit size of the present structure is <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$2.93 \lambda^{2} g$</tex>.
title_zh: 一种采用改进耦合器与交叉器的宽带3×3 Nolen矩阵设计，适用于无线局域网（WLAN）应用。
abstract_zh: 提出了一种基于微带线的拓扑结构，用于PCB技术中的Nolen矩阵。该设计在无需增大尺寸的情况下显著提升了带宽。通过新开发的改进型定向耦合器（DC）与交叉器（crossover）的组合，相比传统混合耦合器（HC）为基础的方案，有效带宽至少提高了400%。采用0°、120°和-120°渐进相位差的$3 \times 3$ Nolen矩阵基波束成形网络已被制造并测试，该方法适用于任何更高阶的矩阵。现有原型矩阵在2.15-2.65 GHz频段上表现出>12 dB的回波损耗、>20 dB的隔离度、±1.5 dB的幅度不平衡度和±10°的相位误差，满足无线局域网（WLAN）应用需求。该结构的整体电路尺寸为$2.93 \lambda^{2} g$。

title: Unmasking the Accuracy Illusion: Leveraging Gen AI for Enhanced Security in 6G O-RAN
authors: Kanwardeep Singh Gahlot, Sudhir Kumar, Sharda Tripathi, Sandeep Joshi
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Advanced Networks and Telecommunications Systems (ANTS)
abstract: The evolution of Open Radio Access Networks (O-RANs) is reshaping wireless communications by enabling flexibility, virtualization, and multi-vendor interoperability. However, their disaggregated architecture broadens the attack surface, posing new security risks. Effective intrusion detection remains challenging due to emerging threats, limited labeled data, and class imbalance, which renders traditional metrics like accuracy unreliable. To address this, we propose Fense, a framework that combines feature-engineered Tabular Generative Adversarial Networks (TGANs) with Matthews Correlation Coefficient (MCC) for robust performance evaluation and synthetic data generation. Experiments show that Generative AI (Gen AI) enhances detection accuracy, fairness, and resilience, tackling core challenges in O-RAN security.
title_zh:
Unmasking the Accuracy Illusion: Leveraging Gen AI for Enhanced Security in 6G O-RAN  
翻译：  
**《揭露准确性迷思：借助生成式AI增强6G开放式无线接入网的安全》**  

解析：  
1. **"Unmasking the Accuracy Illusion"**  
   - "Unmasking" 译为 **"揭露"**（强调揭示隐藏的问题），比直译“脱下面具”更符合技术语境。  
   - "Accuracy Illusion" 译为 **"准确性迷思"**，其中“迷思”（myth）比“错觉”（illusion）更贴切，因原文暗指“对准确性的过度自信”而非单纯认知偏差。  

2. **"Leveraging Gen AI for Enhanced Security"**  
   - "Leveraging" 译为 **"借助"**（强调利用技术手段），比“利用”更突出合作性。  
   - "Gen AI" 译为 **"生成式AI"**（通用术语，符合中文技术圈习惯）。  
   - "Enhanced Security" 译为 **"增强安全"**（简洁明确）。  

3. **"6G O-RAN"**  
   - "O-RAN" 译为 **"开放式无线接入网"**（行业标准译法，保留O-RAN缩写便于国际读者理解）。  
   - "6G" 保留英文缩写，中文语境中技术术语常直接使用（如5G、6G）。  

**整体风格**：学术性与技术性并重，标题需简洁有力，符合中文论文/报告的命名习惯。
abstract_zh: 开放无线接入网（O-RAN）的演进正通过实现灵活性、虚拟化和多厂商互操作性重塑无线通信领域。然而，其解耦架构扩大了攻击面，带来了新的安全风险。由于不断出现的威胁、有限的标注数据以及类别不平衡问题，传统指标（如准确率）已无法有效评估入侵检测效果。为此，我们提出Fense框架，该框架通过结合特征工程优化的表格生成对抗网络（TGANs）与马修斯相关系数（MCC）实现强大的性能评估和合成数据生成。实验表明，生成式人工智能（Gen AI）显著提升了检测准确率、公平性和系统鲁棒性，有效解决了O-RAN安全领域的核心挑战。
